name: I-Lorazepam
description: I-benzodiazepine esebenza ngokumaphakathi. Umugqa wokuqala wokwelashwa kwe-IV/IM wesimo se-epilepticus kanye nokuquleka okunamandla. Ibuye isetshenziselwe ukudambisa inqubo kanye ne-anxiolysis.
dose: Ukubanjwa: 4 mg IV/IO push slow over 2 min. Phinda u-4 mg emizuzwini emi-5-10 uma ukuquleka kuqhubeka. I-IM: 4 mg uma i-IV ingatholakali.
warnings: Idala ukudangala kokuphefumula -- yiba ne-BVM nemishini yomoya.
I-sedation ingathatha amahora angu-6-8 - qapha indlela yokuphefumula.
Ukuyaluza okuyindida kungenzeka, ikakhulukazi kubantu asebekhulile nasezinganeni.

pediatric.dose: 0.05-0.1 mg/kg IV/IM (ubukhulu obungu-4 mg/umthamo). Phinda kanye emizuzwini engu-5-10 uma kudingeka.
pediatric.note: Kukhethwa ngaphezu kwe-diazepam yokulawulwa kokuthunjwa kwe-IV ezinganeni.

obstetric.note: Iwela i-placenta - ukucindezeleka kokuphefumula kwezingane ezisanda kuzalwa kungenzeka. Sebenzisa esimweni sikamama i-epilepticus lapho inzuzo idlula ingozi.

source: JTS CPG / Standard Seizure Management Guidelines
